title: Provider-neutral reconciliation lifecycle
content: [*] --> StatementOnly: approved statement row has no candidate
RecordedUnreconciled --> StatementReconciled: authoritative statement correction replaces fact
RecordedUnreconciled --> AmbiguousMatch: multiple or unsafe candidates
RecordedUnreconciled --> ReconciliationException: incompatible or policy error
RecordedUnreconciled --> RecordedAbsentFromStatement: completed scope has no confirming row
AmbiguousMatch --> OwnerConfirmedMatch: owner confirms candidate or correction
AmbiguousMatch --> StatementOnly: owner confirms no prior event
StatementReconciled --> RecordedUnreconciled: decision revoked and prior fact valid
OwnerConfirmedMatch --> RecordedUnreconciled: decision revoked and prior fact valid
StatementOnly --> ReconciliationException: decision replaced after correction
RecordedAbsentFromStatement --> StatementReconciled: coverage or evidence corrected
